performer.display: The University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center

conclusion: Next-generation sequencing panel (finalized 2024-10-10): EGFR wild-type, ALK rearrangement negative, ROS1 rearrangement negative, BRAF V600E negative, KRAS G12C POSITIVE, MET amplification negative. PD-L1 expression by 22C3 immunohistochemistry: Tumor Proportion Score (TPS) 60% (high expression). No actionable driver mutations identified for first-line targeted therapy. KRAS G12C mutation identified.
